name: Patchouli Knowledge
description:
The asthmatic librarian from the Touhou Project.

Art made by ザコザコY (zakozakoY).

I'm back (once again)! Part 3 of the 6 part Scarlet Devil Mansion series. There were no bots cause of slight problems in my life, but now I'll post bots more frequently (this time for real). Thanks and enjoy!
creator: Wholesome Sablin
